entities.name: TANAOSTIGMODES CAJANINAE
entities.description: A new species of insect that feeds on the pods of pigeon pea and certain weeds.

entities.name: PIGEON PEA
entities.description: Cajanus cajan, a crop that can be infested by Tanaostigmodes cajaninae.

entities.name: ATYLOSIA SPP.
entities.description: A weed species that serves as a host for Tanaostigmodes cajaninae.

entities.name: RHYNCHOSIA SPP.
entities.description: A weed species that serves as a host for Tanaostigmodes cajaninae.

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: A state in India where the ICRISAT research farm is located.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the insect is widespread and the study was conducted.

entities.name: ENDOSULFAN
entities.description: A chemical agent that reduces the parasites of Tanaostigmodes cajaninae.

entities.name: PARASITES
entities.description: Organisms that naturally control the population of Tanaostigmodes cajaninae.

entities.name: LATE-MATURING
entities.description: A characteristic of pigeon pea crops associated with higher infestation rates.

entities.name: PEST STATUS
entities.description: The state of an organism becoming a significant threat to crop production.
